metadata.title: Projected Stability and Unresolved Structural Gaps in Constrained Nonlocal Actions
metadata.description: A research archive containing numerical scripts, automated stability scans, and LaTeX documentation exploring discrete non-local transport functionals under global L2 normalization constraints. Documents the rigorous proof of tangent-bundle stability alongside an unresolved structural anomaly regarding an emergent 0.79 numerical scaling attractor that directly contradicts linearized characteristic analysis.
